data.body:
FOUNDATION MAP (from Explore, verified). CRITICAL: three colliding E1..E6 namespaces — (a) epic-6982 experiments; (b) plan-review CRITERION ids E1/E2/E3/E5/E6 in criteria_routing.json (evidence-family criteria, NOT experiments); (c) stale old experiment plan. Do not conflate.
VALID foundations: runs/outcome_corpus.jsonl = 628 rows, 9-key schema, post_claim_edit_class is the outcome field (enum: none/ac-strengthened/operator-attested-retag/substantive-unclassified/cosmetic); schema doc runs/README.md:53-88; producer harnesses/mine_outcome_corpus.py (raw git-object walk of .tickets-tracker branch; --verify-s5; --dry-run; REVIEWED_FLOOR=500). corpus_sample.json = 19 plan-review INPUTS (unlabeled). adjudication_corpus.jsonl = 400 rows NOW UNLABELED (labels descoped; impact/validity/priority are the GATE'S OWN self-assessment, not gold). adjudicate.py/kappa.py do not exist.
§5.2 8 frozen labels (mine_outcome_corpus.py:406-416 S5_PUBLISHED + runs/README.md:99-102): MISSED=dc58-af7b,db7b-c8fd,5886-d028; CAUGHT-BUT-IGNORED=c8cc-68b8,f5df-0069,115b-ceea,8c4f-b81c; UNKNOWABLE=3006-e198.
SOTA §6 verbatim gate rows: R1 (i)>=2/3 of dc58/db7b/5886 surface absent-capability finding; (ii) FP-control 30 PASS plans, fail if >3/30 gain blocking or median new-advisory rises >1. R2 (i)115b/8c4f pre-edit ACs flagged; (ii)50 flagged ACs >=70% human-judged operator-attestable; (iii)flag rate <~5%. R3(=E2 seeded-flaw) >=7/10 mutants flagged AND <=1/10 originals (>=87% discrimination). R4 (i)5886 surfaces existing fetcher.py; (ii)>=1 necessity catch, blocking-FP<=10%, advisory-accept>=30%. R5 re-run Pass-2 over dc58/db7b persisted findings: >=1/ticket asserted_capability_confirmed=no at >=advisory-cap; fail if blocking rate rises >3pts (base 45%) over 50-review replay. R6 ship-first (2-month A/B dogfood). R7 reproduce 8-case classification >=6/8; baselines 3.2% edit,3/8 miss,4/8 advisory-latency. SOTA priority: R7->R2->R1+R5->R6->R4->R3 (epic ordering: R7+R6 first wave).
Gate sidecar = REVIEW_RESULT event (sidecar.py, schema plan_review_result_v2); per-finding impact/validity/priority = gate's persisted self-assessment (E6 self-consistency substrate). IMPACT_MODEL_VERSION in review_kernel/decide.py.
